comment: Synthetic metastatic CRC, 58M, ECOG 1, left-sided sigmoid primary, extended-RAS WT (KRAS exons 2/3/4 + NRAS exons 2/3/4 all WT) + BRAF-WT + MSS. Engine routes ALGO-CRC-METASTATIC-1L step 1 (no MSI-H) → step 2 (RF-CRC-RAS-WT fires + 'Left-sided primary (splenic flexure or distal)' literal-key clause truthy) → IND-CRC-METASTATIC-1L-RAS-WT-LEFT (FOLFOX + cetuximab, CRYSTAL/FIRE-3/CALGB-80405 left-sided benefit). Wiring note: the sidedness criterion is currently a free-text condition string evaluated as a literal finding-key lookup (no dedicated RF for primary-tumour location); patient profile sets that exact string truthy to fire step 2. A future RF-CRC-LEFT-SIDED-PRIMARY would be cleaner.
